scripts.start: concurrently --prefix "{time} {name} †" -k --kill-signal SIGKILL -t "HH:mm" -n "FE,BE" -c "green.bold,red.bold" "yarn workspace ffmpeg-converter-next dev" "go run ."
scripts.start:spa: concurrently --prefix "{time} {name} †" -k --kill-signal SIGKILL -t "HH:mm" -n "FE,BE" -c "green.bold,red.bold" "yarn workspace ffmpeg-converter-web start" "go run ."
